chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.S-134 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.09.2025. Mr. Sikandar A.Kolachi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Inspector / SHO Ghulam Mujtaba Bhutto from PS Khansar, Tharparkar. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks legal protection. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the official respondents are harassing the Petitioner on the behest of private respondents and prayed for legal protection. Mr. A.A.G present in Court alongwith SHO PS Khansar files comments of Respondent No.2 to 5 and he further submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. SHO PS Khansar present in Court also submits that no undue harassment is caused to the Petitioner and whenever Petitioner would approach at PS, legal protection would be extended to him. Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioner, as and when approached. Let a copy of this order be communicated to SSP Tharparkar for information and compliance. JUDGE Ali.
